The company offers telecommunication services, such as data, managed network services, Cloud PBX, SIP Trunking, and managed cybersecurity offerings to government, enterprises, and small and medium enterprises. It also provides managed telecommunications network services, including telecom engineering projects, such as Wi-Fi hotspots, mobile base stations, and fiber optic infrastructure; fixed network solutions, equipment installation and integration, and radio frequency design and network optimization solutions; and cloud services and applications, data center and disaster recovery, and Internet of Things for smart farming, smart cities, and healthcare solutions. In addition, the company engages in the provision of telecommunication related products and services, and information technology services. Further, the company offers system integration and software solutions and trades in computer hardware. Additionally, it provides information technology solutions, including cloud related products, and services; fiber optic transmission network and project management services related to telecommunications; fixed and mobile services and telecommunications related services; and business solutions in information technology, as well as builds interconnection of embedded computing device within existing internet infrastructures. REDtone Digital Berhad has a strategic partnership with GPTBots.AI to enhance enterprise AI services. The company was formerly known as REDtone International Berhad. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Puchong, Malaysia. REDtone Digital Berhad is a subsidiary of Berjaya Corporation Berhad.

They offer services such as energy audits, system design, and installation of energy-saving equipment. The company aims to help businesses reduce their energy consumption and environmental impact.

name: BINACOM
summary: Binacom Holdings Berhad provides information technology (IT) solutions and services, including software development, system integration, and consulting. The company serves various industries with its IT expertise. Binacom Holdings Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: QES
summary: QES provides inspection, test, and measurement equipment, as well as related services, for the semiconductor, electronics, and other industries. They distribute equipment from leading manufacturers and offer maintenance, repair, and calibration services. QES Group Berhad is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: WEGMANS
summary: Wegmans Holdings Berhad is involved in the manufacturing and sale of furniture products. The company offers a range of furniture for residential and commercial use. Wegmans Holdings Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: GDB
summary: GDB is a construction company involved in building construction services, focusing on high-rise residential and commercial buildings. They undertake construction projects as a main contractor, providing services such as structural works, architectural finishes, and mechanical and electrical installations. GDB Holdings Berhad is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: TRIMODE
summary: TRIMODE provides integrated logistics services, including transportation, warehousing, and distribution. They offer services such as freight forwarding, customs brokerage, and supply chain management. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including manufacturing, retail, and healthcare.

name: REVENUE
summary: REVENUE provides payment solutions and electronic transaction processing services. They offer a range of services, including payment gateway solutions, point-of-sale (POS) systems, and electronic funds transfer (EFT) processing. The company enables businesses to accept and process payments through various channels.

name: RGTECH
summary: RGTech Engineering (formerly known as RGT Berhad) provides engineering services, including mechanical and electrical engineering, civil and structural engineering, and project management. The company serves various industries with its engineering expertise. RGTech Engineering is based in Malaysia.

name: SMETRIC
summary: SMTrack Berhad provides radio frequency identification (RFID) solutions for tracking and tracing assets, products, and people. The company's RFID technology is used in various industries, including logistics, retail, and healthcare. SMTrack Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: DPIH
summary: DPIH is an investment holding company. Its subsidiaries are mainly involved in investment property and property letting. The company is based in Malaysia.

name: NADIBHD
summary: NADIBHD is involved in property development and construction activities. They undertake projects for residential, commercial, and industrial properties. The company develops and sells properties, and also provides construction services for other developers.

name: MESTRON
summary: MESTRON is involved in the manufacturing of steel structures, including street lighting poles, high masts, and towers. They supply these structures to infrastructure projects, telecommunications companies, and other industries. The company also provides engineering and construction services for related projects.

name: GREATEC
summary: GREATEC is involved in the design, manufacturing, and assembly of automated equipment for various industries, including solar, semiconductor, and electronics. They provide customized automation solutions to improve manufacturing processes. The company is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: AIMFLEX
summary: AIMFLEX is involved in the manufacturing of flexible packaging materials, including printed films and laminated films. They supply packaging materials to various industries, including food, beverage, and consumer products. The company's products are used for packaging a wide range of products.

name: KHJB
summary: KHJB Berhad is an investment holding company. KHJB Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: TASHIN
summary: TASHIN is a steel processor and steel products manufacturer and supplier. The company operates steel service centres. The group’s products include steel pipes, flat bars, square bars, angle bars, expanded metals, C channel purlins, metal roofings and others.

name: MTAG
summary: MTAG is a label stock manufacturer and printer that converts label stock into finished labels. They provide labels for various industries, including electronics, consumer goods, and healthcare. The company also provides printing and die-cutting services.

name: SLVEST
summary: SLVEST is involved in the provision of renewable energy solutions, focusing on solar energy systems. They offer engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) services for solar power plants. The company aims to promote the adoption of renewable energy and reduce carbon emissions.

name: SPRING
summary: Spring Gallery Berhad is involved in property development and construction activities. The company develops residential and commercial properties. Spring Gallery Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: PWRWELL

They offer services such as power plant construction, operation and maintenance, and energy management. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including utilities, industrial plants, and commercial buildings.

name: ACO
summary: ACO is involved in the distribution of lighting products and electrical accessories, catering to residential, commercial, and industrial customers. They offer a range of lighting fixtures, lamps, wiring devices, and other electrical products. The company aims to provide energy-efficient and reliable lighting solutions.

name: OVH
summary: OVH provides data center services, cloud computing solutions, and web hosting services. They offer a range of services including dedicated servers, virtual private servers (VPS), and cloud storage. The company aims to provide scalable and reliable IT infrastructure solutions for businesses.

name: OPTIMAX
summary: OPTIMAX is an eye specialist center that provides a range of eye care services, including refractive surgery, cataract surgery, and general ophthalmology. They offer advanced eye treatments using state-of-the-art technology. The company aims to provide comprehensive and personalized eye care to patients.

name: SAMAIDEN
summary: SAMAIDEN provides engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) services for renewable energy projects, particularly in the solar power sector. They offer services such as solar power plant design, installation, and maintenance. The company focuses on promoting sustainable energy solutions and reducing carbon emissions.

name: SCGBHD
summary: SCG Berhad is involved in construction and property development activities. SCG Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: ANEKA

name: EFRAME
summary: E-Frame Berhad is an investment holding company that invests in businesses. E-Frame Berhad is based in Malaysia.

name: HPPHB
summary: HPPHB provides healthcare services, operating hospitals and medical centers. They offer a range of medical specialties and services, including general medicine, surgery, and specialized treatments. The company aims to provide quality healthcare to patients in the communities they serve.

name: MOBILIA
summary: MOBILIA is involved in the design, manufacturing, and marketing of furniture products for residential and commercial use. They offer a range of furniture items, including sofas, beds, dining sets, and office furniture. The company focuses on providing stylish and functional furniture solutions.

name: TELADAN

Teladan Setia Group Berhad is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: FLEXI

name: CLOUD

name: MHCARE

name: MYKRIS

name: BABA
summary: BABA is involved in food processing. The company produces various spice products. BABA is based in Malaysia.

name: TOPVISN

name: CRG

name: MCOM
summary: MCOM Holdings Berhad is a mobile communication solutions company. MCOM Holdings Berhad is based in Malaysia. They provide services to businesses.

name: SMILE
summary: SMILE-LINK HEALTHCARE GLOBAL BERHAD is involved in Healthcare products. SMILE-LINK HEALTHCARE GLOBAL BERHAD is based in Malaysia. The products are for distribution.

name: ENEST
summary: ENEST SDN BHD is an investment holding company. The company invest in businesses. ENEST SDN BHD is based in Malaysia.

name: MMIS
summary: MMIS Berhad is involved in design and manufacture of precision tools and equipment. MMIS Berhad is based in Malaysia. They are specialized in the engineering process.

name: IDBTECH

name: SGBHD

name: First Real Estate Investment Trust
summary: First Real Estate Investment Trust (√Ç¬ìFirst REIT√Ç¬î) is a real estate investment trust constituted by the Trust Deed entered into on 19 October 2006 between First REIT Management Limited (formerly Bowsprit Capital Corporation Limited) as the Manager and HSBC Institutional Trust Services (Singapore) Limited as the Trustee. First REIT was listed on the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited on 11 December 2006. On 1 March 2018, HSBC Institutional Trust Services (Singapore) Limited retired as the Trustee of First REIT in favour of Perpetual (Asia) Limited. First REIT is Singapore's first healthcare real estate investment trust that aims to invest in a diversified portfolio of income-producing real estate and / or real estate-related assets in Asia that are primarily used for healthcare and / or healthcare-related purposes. Managed by First REIT Management Limited,, First REIT's portfolio consists of 20 properties located in Indonesia, Singapore and South Korea, namely 1) Siloam Hospitals Lippo Village, 2) Siloam Hospitals Kebon Jeruk, 3) Siloam Hospitals Surabaya, 4) Imperial Aryaduta Hotel & Country Club, 5) Mochtar Riady Comprehensive Cancer Centre, 6) Siloam Hospitals Lippo Cikarang, 7) Siloam Hospitals Manado & Hotel Aryaduta Manado, 8) Siloam Hospitals Makassar, 9) Siloam Hospitals Bali, 10) Siloam Hospitals TB Simatupang, 11) Siloam Hospitals Purwakarta, 12) Siloam Sriwijaya, 13) Siloam Hospitals Kupang & Lippo Plaza Kupang, 14) Siloam Hospitals Labuan Bajo, 15) Siloam Hospitals Buton & Lippo Plaza Buton, 16) Siloam Hospitals Yogyakarta, 17) Pacific Healthcare Nursing Home @ Bukit Merah, 18) Pacific Healthcare Nursing Home II @ Bukit Panjang, 19) The Lentor Residence and 20) Sarang Hospital. Its hospital assets in Indonesia are operated by PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk, a subsidiary of PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk, a strong brand name in the Indonesian healthcare industry supported by a team of international healthcare professionals whereas The Imperial Aryaduta Hotel & Country Club and Hotel Aryaduta Manado are operated by The Aryaduta Hotel and Resort Group. The Lippo Plaza Kupang and Lippo Plaza Buton are managed by PT Lippo Malls Indonesia. In Singapore, the nursing homes at Bukit Merah and Bukit Panjang are operated by Pacific Healthcare Nursing Home Pte. Ltd. and Pacific Eldercare and Nursing Pte. Ltd., respectively. The Lentor Residence is operated by The Lentor Residence Pte. Ltd. In South Korea, the Sarang Hospital is operated by a private doctor. Through First REIT, investors can participate in an asset class that has a focus towards Asia's growing healthcare sector, which is boosted by an increase in life expectancy in Indonesia and the rest of Southeast Asia.

It offers products in various categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, d√É¬©cor, outdoor and garden, and child and teen furnishings. The company provides its products through its retail galleries; and Source Books, a series of catalogs, as well as online through rh.com, rhbabyandchild.com, rhteen.com, and rhmodern.com, as well as waterworks.com. It offers products in various categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, d√É¬©cor, outdoor and garden, and child and teen furnishings. The company provides its products through its retail galleries; and Source Books, a series of catalogs, as well as online through rh.com, rhbabyandchild.com, rhteen.com, and rhmodern.com, as well as waterworks.com. As of January 30, 2021, it operated a total of 68 RH Galleries and 38 RH outlet stores in 31 states in the District of Columbia and Canada, as well as 14 Waterworks showrooms throughout the United States and the United Kingdom. It offers products in various categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, d√É¬©cor, outdoor and garden, and child and teen furnishings. The company provides its products through its retail galleries; and Source Books, a series of catalogs, as well as online through rh.com, rhbabyandchild.com, rhteen.com, and rhmodern.com, as well as waterworks.com. As of January 30, 2021, it operated a total of 68 RH Galleries and 38 RH outlet stores in 31 states in the District of Columbia and Canada, as well as 14 Waterworks showrooms throughout the United States and the United Kingdom. The company was formerly known as Restoration Hardware Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to RH in January 2017. RH was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Corte Madera, California.

name: Adventa Bhd
summary: Adventa Bhd is a Malaysia-based company involved in the manufacturing and distribution of medical devices, particularly in the area of renal care. They produce hemodialysis concentrates and related products used in the treatment of kidney failure. The company is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: Goodway Integrated Industries Bhd
summary: Goodway Integrated Industries Bhd is a Malaysia-based company involved in the manufacturing of rubber compounds and the retreading of tires. They serve various industries, including automotive, construction, and transportation. The company is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: Intel Corporation
summary: Intel Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells essential technologies for the cloud, smart, and connected devices for retail, industrial, and consumer uses worldwide. The company operates through DCG, IOTG, Mobileye, NSG, PSG, CCG, and All Other segments. It offers platform products, such as central processing units and chipsets, and system-on-chip and multichip packages; and non-platform or adjacent products comprising accelerators, boards and systems, connectivity products, and memory and storage products. The company also provides Internet of Things products, including high-performance compute solutions for targeted verticals and embedded applications; and computer vision and machine learning-based sensing, data analysis, localization, mapping, and driving policy technology. It serves original equipment manufacturers, original design manufacturers, and cloud service providers. Intel Corporation has a strategic partnership with MILA to develop and apply advances in artificial intelligence methods for enhancing the search in the space of drugs. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, California.

summary: ROHAS is a Malaysia-based company engaged in engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) services, manufacturing of steel towers, and power generation. The company serves the telecommunications, power, and renewable energy sectors. ROHAS is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: Bertam Alliance Bhd
summary: Bertam Alliance Bhd is involved in property development, construction, and project management activities. The company focuses on residential and commercial projects in Malaysia. Its headquarters are located in Malaysia.

name: Prestar Resources Bhd
summary: Prestar Resources Bhd is a Malaysia-based company that manufactures and trades steel products. The company's products include steel pipes, steel sheets, steel coils, and other steel-related products. Prestar Resources Bhd is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: Gromutual Bhd
summary: Gromutual Bhd is a Malaysia-based investment holding company with subsidiaries involved in property development, construction, and investment properties. The company focuses on developing residential and commercial properties. Gromutual Bhd is headquartered in Malaysia.

name: Pensonic Holdings Bhd
summary: Pensonic Holdings Bhd is a Malaysia-based company involved in the manufacturing, distribution, and marketing of electrical and electronic appliances.
